headline: GM clinches NASA contract to build battery for moon-bound vehicle
summary: GM is a subcontractor in the development of the highly advanced “Eagle” Lunar Terrain Vehicle that uses technology shared with GM’s Earth vehicles.

raw.headline: GM clinches NASA contract to build battery for moon-bound vehicle

headline: Cleveland-Cliffs’ GM Award Highlights Auto Exposure And Debt-Cash Flow Tradeoff
summary: Cleveland-Cliffs (NYSE:CLF) has been named General Motors' 2025 Supplier of the Year. This is Cleveland-Cliffs' ninth time receiving the award. The company is the only North American steel producer recognized by GM for 2025. Cleveland-Cliffs, a major U.S. steel producer and supplier to the automotive sector, is closely tied to trends in auto production and domestic manufacturing. Recognition from a large automaker like GM highlights the importance of reliable, high-quality steel in...

headline: Gentherm Named a 2025 Supplier of the Year by General Motors
summary: NOVI, Mich., May 26, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Gentherm (NASDAQ: THRM) a global market leader of innovative thermal management and pneumatic comfort technologies, has been presented with a 2025 Supplier of the Year Award at General Motors’ 34th annual Supplier of the Year event in Austin, Texas. headline: Treasury Secretary Bessent needs better advisors on China, says Z-Ben Advisors' Peter Alexander
summary: Peter Alexander, Z-Ben Advisors founder and managing director, joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the state of U.S.-China relations, takeaways from the Trump-Xi summit, impact of AI on the Chinese workforce, and more.
